main.description: Modify the radio queue using the existing backend queue operations.

action.description: Queue operation to perform. Required companion fields are enforced by the server.

songIds.description: Song ids to append when action is enqueue.

atTop.description: Insert ahead of the rest of the queue instead of appending, when action is enqueue. Default false.

sequence.description: Order the enqueued songs by transition score (artist and album separation, energy, genre, tempo) instead of keeping the given order. Default false.

queueId.description: Queue item id to remove when action is remove.

queueIds.description: Queue item ids in desired order when action is reorder.
